notes:
v1.9.1 Update
✨ New Features:
• Preset Getter API: 6 new public API methods — getGlobalPreset(name), getAllOutPreset(name), getActorPresets(actor), and more. Fetch presets by name or ID without digging into game settings.

🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Brush Theme Not Rendering: The background paint CSS rule was accidentally deleted in v1.9.0. Restored — brush theme works again.
• Eclipse Theme — Text Shadow Stays Yellow: Main and sub text shadows were hardcoded to gold instead of following the theme color. Now uses the configured theme color.

announcement.title: 🎬 Cinematic Cut-ins v1.9.1
announcement.content:
v1.9.1 — Preset API & Bug Fixes

  • 🔌 Preset API: New getter methods — fetch presets by name or ID via api.getGlobalPreset("My Style").
  • 🐛 Brush Theme: Background was invisible since v1.9.0 — now fixed.
  • 🐛 Eclipse Shadow: Text glow no longer stays yellow when theme color is changed.
